title: Claude Oceanus V1-P (Mythos?- FULLY TESTED): I TESTED IT & IT'S ACTUALLY CRAZY!
summary: YouTuber AICodeKing tested a leaked model appearing as Oceanus V1-P (possibly called Mythos) across coding, visual, reasoning, math, and game tasks using OpenCode benchmarks. The model scored perfectly and outperformed Claude Opus 4.8, GPT-5.5, Gemini 3.5 Flash, DeepSeek V4 Pro, and other models on tasks including web app development, 3D animations, game building, combinatorics, and agentic workflows.
